raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-directed affirmation and commitment to identity-level change",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "identity is modifiable in real time like code",
    "current roles can be accurately identified as obsolete",
    "self-love during change is both possible and beneficial",
    "future identity can be enacted in the present without contradiction"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a set of positive self-statements; metaphors are compatible within a growth-oriented frame but rest on unexamined assumptions about agency and temporality",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "user treats statements as actionable reminders that prompt observable behavior change and emotional regulation rather than as literal descriptions of mechanism",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "user interprets metaphors as factual mechanisms, uses them to bypass concrete problem-solving, or experiences them as pressure to perform an inauthentic self"
}
